chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1552 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6117/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.6118/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For orders on CMA No.6119/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 17.09.2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Granted. 2. To be complied with within seven days’ time. 3. Granted subject to just all legal exceptions. 4&5. Counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner intends to file an appropriate application in C.P. No.D-557 of 2025, which was inadvertently withdrawn; as such, he does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
